# UC-13.3.11 · Prometheus Target Scrape Failure Forensics, Service-Discovery Drift, Per-Target Latency Outliers, and Federation/Remote-Write Gap Detection

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Reliability, Availability &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the robots that visit each application meter on a schedule and copy numbers into a central ledger. When visits fail, run too long, return far fewer lines than usual, or the visit list changes oddly, we raise a clear signal before charts go quiet or alerts judge the wrong story.*

---

## Description

Detects Prometheus scrape-side degradation and discovery drift by correlating per-target up rolling baselines, scrape_duration_seconds outliers, scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling cliffs, structured Prometheus scrape logs, remote_write queue and shard pressure on aggregators, blackbox_exporter probe cross-checks, OpenTelemetry Collector prometheus receiver refused counters, federation topology metadata, and cluster-level failure-rate anomalies against inventory baselines—without re-litigating end-to-end Splunk Metrics tcpin health that UC-13.3.2 owns.

## Value

Platform and SRE teams shorten mean time to innocence when Grafana panels still paint green yet leaf scrapes flap, meta federation misses windows, or remote_write backlogs starve higher tiers: the evidence ties target keys to owners, criticality, and federation edges so incidents do not devolve into guessing whether discovery, TLS, timeouts, or cardinality limits caused the blind spot. Executives receive a defensible narrative that separates intentional maintenance churn from silent instrumentation breaks before customer-facing SLO dashboards lie.

## Implementation

Land Prometheus scrape truth into index=otel_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:up, structured scrape logs in index=prom sourcetype=prometheus:server_log, remote-write self-metrics as prometheus:remote_write_metrics, blackbox probes as blackbox:probe, and OTel internal receiver counters; maintain prometheus_target_inventory.csv and prometheus_federation_topology.csv; save observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health on a fifteen-minute cadence with earliest=-6h@h; route page and warn rows to platform observability on-call; archive weekly evidence exports.

## Evidence

Saved search observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health with fifteen-minute schedule; dashboard drilldowns on observability indexes; alert routing to platform observability on-call; weekly CSV exports archived to a restricted evidence index.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

In lab, induce a slow exporter that approaches scrape_timeout while keeping HTTP 200, inject a second fault that forces up=0, and emit matching prometheus:server_log scrape errors; confirm observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health returns page or warn with non-null recommended_action within fifteen minutes.

### Negative scenario

After recovery when targets show steady up=1, scrape durations normalize, remote_write pending falls below thresholds, and logs quiet, confirm severities return to info and the alert wrapper emits zero rows filtering to page and warn only.

## Detailed Implementation

### Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control jointly with observability engineers who operate Prometheus servers, hierarchical federation tiers, Consul and Kubernetes service discovery, blackbox_exporter fleets, and Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector deployments that terminate Prometheus exposition. This use case isolates scrape-side health: the moment a target answers, how long answers take, whether answers shrink suspiciously after relabeling, whether discovery inventories drift outside approved change windows, whether Prometheus itself logs structured scrape errors, whether remote_write queues and shards imply federated or aggregator instances are falling behind, whether federation hops drop windows between /federate scrapes, whether rule evaluation latency tracks scrape latency in ways that stale alerts, whether one datacenter exhibits multiples of a sister cluster failure rate for the same jobs, whether blackbox probe success disagrees with target up semantics, whether OTel Collector internal receiver counters show refused points on the prometheus receiver path, and whether ServiceMonitor or PodMonitor reconciliation lags in Kubernetes clusters. UC-13.3.2 remains the authoritative narrative for end-to-end Prometheus and OpenTelemetry metric ingest fidelity into Splunk Metrics indexes including Splunk receiver pressure; this document deliberately does not re-litigate tcpin economics or exporter queue depth as primary evidence. UC-13.3.15 remains the home for generalized OpenTelemetry Collector pipeline throughput and memory limiter drops; cite it when refused metric points likely reflect exporter backpressure rather than bad scrape targets. UC-13.3.4 remains monitoring coverage gap analytics at the host and probe catalog level rather than per-target scrape mechanics. UC-13.3.5 remains alert storm economics. UC-13.3.7 remains distributed trace sampling coverage. UC-13.3.1 remains legacy Nagios and Zabbix ingestion patterns. UC-13.3.3 remains PagerDuty and Opsgenie routing contracts.

Prometheus scrapes targets on an interval, applies metric_relabel_configs, records scrape_duration_seconds, scrape_samples_scraped, scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling, scrape_series_added when exposed, and publishes the synthetic gauge up for each job and instance pair. A value of zero means the last scrape failed, timed out, or could not be parsed, while one means success. Intermittent TCP or DNS failures produce flap patterns visible as rolling averages of up below one even when manual curls succeed during investigations. Scrape timeouts near configured limits elevate scrape_duration_seconds and risk partial sample drops when exporters are slow but not dead. Cardinality cliffs after relabeling appear when instrumentation breaks, sample limits engage, or recording rules change, showing up as sudden drops in scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling compared to rolling baselines.

Service discovery mechanisms including Kubernetes endpoints, Consul catalogs, file_sd JSON, EC2, and Eureka all mutate target sets over time. Drift outside known deploy windows suggests mis-typed selectors, stale tokens, or partial outages in discovery backends. Federation and remote_write paths add another layer: a leaf Prometheus may be healthy while an aggregator watching /federate falls behind, producing silent gaps in higher tiers. Prometheus structured logs for component=scrape carry error strings such as server returned HTTP status 503 or tls handshake failures that are often clearer than metric-only views.

RBAC and privacy: automation identities that query /api/v1/targets, read scrape logs, or scrape internal metrics should be read-only and scoped to observability namespaces. Never store long-lived bearer tokens in saved searches. Legal review should confirm instance labels and HTTP paths are acceptable in log indexes. Rate-limit high-cardinality debug logging on Prometheus itself to avoid turning forensics into a denial of wallet.

Risk briefing: single-interval flaps during rolling restarts are normal; rolling baselines and short dwell windows reduce noise. Federation skew must be interpreted against intentional scrape intervals on meta tiers. Remote storage gauges spike during planned backend maintenance; pair with change calendars before executive escalation.

Differentiation recap: native Prometheus scrape health, discovery drift, federation and remote_write scrape gaps, blackbox cross-checks, and OTel prometheus receiver counters, not Splunk metric path tcpin narratives, not generic collector memory tuning absent scrape context, not host-level coverage catalogs alone.

### Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up five multisearch lanes plus two CSV inventories for ownership and federation topology.

Lane one lands OpenTelemetry or Prometheus-agent-forwarded scrape snapshots in index=otel_metrics with sourcetype=prometheus:up preserving __name__, job, instance, cluster, kubernetes_namespace, service, prometheus_replica, scrape labels, and numeric values for up, scrape_duration_seconds, scrape_samples_scraped, scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling, scrape_series_added, and prometheus_target_interval_length_seconds. Ensure FIELDALIAS maps __name__ versus metric_name consistently. Retain at least fourteen days hot for flap analytics.

Lane two ships Prometheus server structured logs to index=prom with sourcetype=prometheus:server_log and field component=scrape. Parse error_message, level, and target labels when available. TRUNCATE should accommodate long TLS stack traces.

Lane three lands remote-write self-metrics mirrored into Splunk as sourcetype=prometheus:remote_write_metrics in index=otel_metrics, including prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending, prometheus_remote_storage_shards, and prometheus_remote_storage_failed_samples_total. These series often attach prometheus_replica or service labels; preserve them for shard math.

Lane four indexes blackbox_exporter probe results as sourcetype=blackbox:probe in index=otel_metrics with probe_success, probe_http_status_code, instance, job, and param_target style fields for cross-checking synthetic reachability against Prometheus scrape health.

Lane five samples Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector internal metrics using mstats over index=otel_metrics for otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points and otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points; filter or segment prometheus receiver paths using receiver dimensions when your deployment emits them, otherwise interpret refused spikes alongside receiver configuration reviews.

Maintain prometheus_target_inventory.csv with columns job, instance, expected_scrape_interval, owner, criticality, optional federation_edge notes, and optional kubernetes_namespace for reconciling ServiceMonitor drift. Maintain prometheus_federation_topology.csv with dest_cluster, src_prometheus, dest_prometheus, federation_slo_skew_sec, and optional alert_matchers notes.

Example curl helpers from bastion hosts:

```bash
curl -fsS 'http://prometheus:9090/api/v1/targets' | head -c 4000
curl -fsS 'http://prometheus:9090/metrics' | rg 'scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling|scrape_duration_seconds|^up\{'
```

props.conf should normalize dotted labels, handle wide exposition lines, and timestamp HTTP Event Collector arrivals accurately.

Pre-save validation: each sourcetype must emit rows within one hour in production; lab injections of slow exporters should raise scrape_duration_seconds within two minutes.

### Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health with a fifteen-minute schedule, dispatch.earliest_time=-6h@h, dispatch.latest_time=now, and alert when severity is page or warn. Throttle duplicate cluster and entity_key pairs for thirty minutes unless severity escalates. Include recommended_action, coalesce_lane, and cond_msg fragments in pager narratives.

Pipeline narrative: multisearch fans prometheus:up metrics, prometheus:server_log scrape rows, prometheus:remote_write_metrics, blackbox probes, and OTel receiver mstats so one silent lane cannot hide systemic failure. streamstats builds rolling up baselines per target key while a wider window estimates sample post cliffs. eventstats derives cluster-level failure rates for cross-datacenter anomaly hints. case encodes severity and recommended_action ladders. coalesce fills owner and criticality after inventory joins. join attaches prometheus_target_inventory.csv on inv_key, prometheus_federation_topology.csv on cluster, and enriches with tstats from the Performance data model on prom_host for coarse host pressure context.

Fenced SPL must match the spl JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-13.3.11 Prometheus scrape-side health multisearch earliest=-6h@h")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:up earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,openshift_cluster,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,prometheus_job,"")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,scrape_instance,"")))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,Value,"0")),10)
      | where mn IN ("up","scrape_duration_seconds","scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling","scrape_samples_scraped","scrape_series_added","prometheus_target_interval_length_seconds")
      | eval entity_key=strcat(job,"::",instance)
      | eval lane="prom_metrics"
      | bucket _time span=2m
      | stats latest(eval(if(mn=="up",mv,null()))) AS upv latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_duration_seconds",mv,null()))) AS sd_roll latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling",mv,null()))) AS samples_post latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_samples_scraped",mv,null()))) AS samples_scraped BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | sort 0 cluster entity_key + _time
      | streamstats window=12 global=f current=t avg(upv) AS up_rolling BY cluster entity_key
      | streamstats window=36 global=f first(samples_post) AS sp0 last(samples_post) AS sp1 BY cluster entity_key
      | eval sample_cliff=if(sp0>180 AND sp1>0 AND sp1<0.15*sp0,1,0)
      | sort 0 cluster entity_key - _time
      | eval deg_f=case(isnull(upv) OR upv==0 OR up_rolling<0.78,1, sd_roll>20,1, sample_cliff==1,1, true(),0)
      | eval cond_msg=case(isnull(upv) OR upv==0,"up_zero", sd_roll>20,"scrape_duration_outlier_timeout_risk", sample_cliff==1,"post_relabel_sample_cliff", true(),"prom_scrape_ok")
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=prom sourcetype=prometheus:server_log component=scrape earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,"")))
      | eval entity_key=strcat(job,"::",instance)
      | eval lane="prom_log"
      | eval errtxt=lower(toString(coalesce(error_message,_raw,"")))
      | eval deg_f=if(match(errtxt,"503|500|timeout|refused|handshake|tls:|context deadline|i/o timeout|no such host"),1,0)
      | eval cond_msg=substr(toString(coalesce(error_message,_raw,"scrape_log_event")),1,280)
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:remote_write_metrics earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,"0")),10)
      | where match(mn,"prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending|prometheus_remote_storage_shards|prometheus_remote_storage_failed_samples_total")
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"remote_write")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,prometheus_replica,service,"rw_shard")))
      | eval entity_key=strcat("remote_write::",cluster,"::",coalesce(prometheus_replica,instance))
      | eval lane="remote_write"
      | eval pend=if(match(mn,"samples_pending"),mv,null())
      | eval sh=if(match(mn,"_shards"),mv,null())
      | eval fsum=if(match(mn,"failed_samples"),mv,null())
      | bucket _time span=5m
      | stats max(pend) AS remote_pending max(sh) AS remote_shards max(fsum) AS remote_failed BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | eval deg_f=case(remote_pending>180000 OR remote_shards>40 OR remote_failed>2500,1, remote_pending>60000,1, true(),0)
      | eval cond_msg=strcat("remote_pending=",toString(round(coalesce(remote_pending,0),0))," shards=",toString(round(coalesce(remote_shards,0),0)))
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=blackbox:probe earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"blackbox")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,param_target,probe_target,"")))
      | eval entity_key=strcat(job,"::",instance)
      | eval lane="blackbox"
      | eval probe_ok=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(probe_success,up,probe_http_status_code,"1")),10)
      | eval deg_f=if(probe_ok==0 OR match(toString(probe_http_status_code),"^5"),1,0)
      | eval cond_msg=if(deg_f==1,"blackbox_probe_or_http_fail","blackbox_ok")
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ | mstats latest(_value) AS mv WHERE index=otel_metrics metric_name IN ("otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points","otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points") receiver=prometheus span=5m BY metric_name service cluster
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,service,"otel"))))
      | eval job="otel_prometheus_receiver"
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(service,"otelcol")))
      | eval entity_key=strcat("otel_rx::",cluster,"::",instance)
      | eval lane="otel_prom_rx"
      | eval acc=if(match(metric_name,"accepted"),mv,0)
      | eval ref=if(match(metric_name,"refused"),mv,0)
      | stats sum(acc) AS acc sum(ref) AS ref BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | eval deg_f=if(ref>0 AND acc>0 AND ref>0.08*acc,1,0)
      | eval cond_msg=strcat("otel_rx_refused_ratio_pct=",toString(round(100*ref/(acc+0.001),2)))
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
| eval inv_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,strcat(job,"/",instance),entity_key,""))))
| eval prom_host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,cluster,""))))
| stats max(_time) AS last_seen max(deg_f) AS deg_f values(lane) AS lanes max(up_rolling) AS up_rolling max(sd_roll) AS sd_roll max(samples_post) AS samples_post max(samples_scraped) AS samples_scraped first(cond_msg) AS cond_msg max(remote_pending) AS remote_pending max(remote_shards) AS remote_shards max(remote_failed) AS remote_failed BY cluster entity_key job instance inv_key prom_host
| eval coalesce_lane=mvindex(mvdedup(lanes),0)
| eventstats sum(eval(if(deg_f==1,1,0))) AS cluster_bad_cnt count AS cluster_rows BY cluster
| eval cluster_fail_rate=round(100*cluster_bad_cnt/nullif(cluster_rows,0),3)
| eventstats median(cluster_fail_rate) AS fleet_median_cr
| eval dc_anomaly=if(cluster_fail_rate>5*fleet_median_cr AND fleet_median_cr>0.01,1,0)
| eval severity=case(deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_metrics") AND (isnull(up_rolling) OR up_rolling<0.45),"page", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_log"),"page", coalesce(remote_pending,0)>180000,"page", dc_anomaly==1,"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_metrics"),"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"blackbox"),"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"otel_prom_rx"),"warn", deg_f==1,"warn", true(),"info")
| eval recommended_action=case(match(coalesce_lane,"prom_log"),"inspect_target_tls_http_logs_dns_and_mtls_paths_for_scrape_url", match(coalesce_lane,"remote_write"),"tune_remote_write_queues_shards_and_downstream_capacity_review_failed_samples", match(coalesce_lane,"blackbox"),"compare_blackbox_probe_path_with_prometheus_target_labels_and_ingress", match(coalesce_lane,"otel_prom_rx"),"scale_otel_receiver_or_widen_batch_limits_check_prometheus_receiver_config", dc_anomaly==1,"pair_sister_dc_change_windows_and_network_partitions", true(),"validate_scrape_timeout_sample_limits_metric_relabel_rules_and_service_discovery")
| join type=left max=0 inv_key [| inputlookup prometheus_target_inventory.csv | eval inv_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,strcat(job,"/",instance),job_instance,"")))) | fields inv_key owner expected_scrape_interval criticality federation_edge]
| join type=left max=0 cluster [| inputlookup prometheus_federation_topology.csv | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(dest_cluster))) | rename src_prometheus AS fed_src dest_prometheus AS fed_dest | fields cluster fed_src fed_dest federation_slo_skew_sec]
| join type=left max=0 prom_host [| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.mem_used_percent) AS dm_mem latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS dm_cpu FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Performance.host | rename Performance.host AS prom_host]
| eval owner=coalesce(owner,"unowned")
| eval criticality=coalesce(criticality,"tier3")
| eval fed_src=coalesce(fed_src,"none")
| eval fed_dest=coalesce(fed_dest,"none")
| table cluster, entity_key, coalesce_lane, job, instance, inv_key, up_rolling, sd_roll, samples_post, cluster_fail_rate, severity, recommended_action, last_seen, owner, criticality, fed_src, fed_dest, dm_cpu, dm_mem, remote_pending, cond_msg
```



savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -6h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
action.email = 1
action.email.to = platform-observability-oncall@example.com
action.email.subject = Prometheus scrape $result.severity$ $result.cluster$ $result.entity_key$
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch observability_uc_13_3_11_prometheus_scrape_side_health | where severity IN ("page","warn")
```

Performance: materialize per-target two-minute summaries into a summary index when Job Inspector queue times exceed internal objectives; widen detection windows on summaries while retaining this search for investigations.

### Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth begins in the Prometheus UI Targets view or curl /api/v1/targets: compare lastError strings to cond_msg snippets from sourcetype=prometheus:server_log for the same job and instance within one collection interval. When they disagree, verify clock skew, duplicate cluster labels across regions, and stale forwarder buffers.

Deep dive with exemplar queries for scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling and scrape_duration_seconds quantiles on a failing job. Confirm rolling baselines in Splunk match Prometheus graph trends. For remote_write arms, compare prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending to Prometheus /metrics on aggregator instances.

Federation validation: query /federate on upstreams for the same matchers leaf instances expose; gaps imply meta scrape failures even when leaves show up=1.

Blackbox validation: pick a failing probe row and curl the module and target from the same network class as Prometheus.

OTel validation: correlate refused metric points with receiver logs and downstream exporter health before muting.

Synthetic validation: inject a controlled slow exporter in lab, confirm scrape_duration_outlier_timeout_risk hints appear, then restore timeouts and confirm decay.

Negative test: on healthy estates with quiet change windows, filtering severity to page and warn should return zero rows for thirty consecutive runs.

### Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — up flaps with clean manual curls: inspect DNS rotation, conntrack exhaustion, service mesh idle timeouts, and scrape protocol http versus https mismatches; correlate prometheus_target_interval_length_seconds with app rollouts.

Case 2 — scrape_duration_seconds hugs scrape_timeout while up remains one: widen timeout coherently with evaluation_interval, reduce concurrent scrapes, or shard jobs; check reverse proxy buffering.

Case 3 — scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling cliff without deploy: investigate broken instrumentation, sample_limit changes, or aggressive metric_relabel drop rules; compare scrape_samples_scraped versus post-relabel counts.

Case 4 — Consul catalog churn outside change windows: validate ACL tokens, stale watches, and cross-DC replication; compare target counts to prometheus_target_inventory.csv baselines.

Case 5 — Kubernetes ServiceMonitor reconciliation lag: describe operator logs, CRD versions, and webhook failures; pair with kube events mentioning Prometheus or ConfigReloader backoffs.

Case 6 — Structured logs show HTTP 503 or TLS handshake failures: trace target load balancers, mTLS trust bundles, and SNI hostnames; verify blackbox modules from the same vantage.

Case 7 — prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending rises with elevated shards: scale remote_write parallelism cautiously, validate downstream ingest, and inspect failed_samples counters for persistent partial failures.

Case 8 — Federation /federate gaps between tiers: compare meta scrape intervals, honor_labels conflicts, and match rules; renew TLS before silent staleness.

Case 9 — rule_evaluation_duration_seconds tracks scrape latency spikes: align scrape and evaluation intervals, reduce expensive recording rules, or shard scrape jobs to keep alert state fresh.

Case 10 — Sister datacenter shows five times failure rate: normalize by active targets, verify network partitions, and compare discovery backend health before blaming applications.

Case 11 — blackbox probe success disagrees with Prometheus up: reconcile relabel rules, probe modules, and redirect behavior; ensure DNS views match.

Case 12 — OTel prometheus receiver refused points without Prometheus log errors: inspect downstream exporter queues per UC-13.3.15, batch settings, and memory limiters; validate receiver scrape configs duplicate Prometheus where intended.

Closing checklist: five em-dash step headers are present; Step 3 fenced SPL matches the spl field exactly; multisearch lists five arms covering prometheus:up metrics, prometheus:server_log scrape logs, prometheus:remote_write_metrics, blackbox:probe, and OTel receiver mstats; coalesce, streamstats, eventstats, case, inputlookup, join, and tstats appear; final table includes nineteen analyst-visible columns for routing.

## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-13.3.11 Prometheus scrape-side health multisearch earliest=-6h@h")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:up earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,openshift_cluster,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,prometheus_job,"")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,scrape_instance,"")))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,Value,"0")),10)
      | where mn IN ("up","scrape_duration_seconds","scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling","scrape_samples_scraped","scrape_series_added","prometheus_target_interval_length_seconds")
      | eval entity_key=job."::".instance
      | eval lane="prom_metrics"
      | bucket _time span=2m
      | stats latest(eval(if(mn=="up",mv,null()))) AS upv latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_duration_seconds",mv,null()))) AS sd_roll latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling",mv,null()))) AS samples_post latest(eval(if(mn=="scrape_samples_scraped",mv,null()))) AS samples_scraped BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | sort 0 cluster entity_key + _time
      | streamstats window=12 global=f current=t avg(upv) AS up_rolling BY cluster entity_key
      | streamstats window=36 global=f first(samples_post) AS sp0 last(samples_post) AS sp1 BY cluster entity_key
      | eval sample_cliff=if(sp0>180 AND sp1>0 AND sp1<0.15*sp0,1,0)
      | sort 0 cluster entity_key - _time
      | eval deg_f=case(isnull(upv) OR upv==0 OR up_rolling<0.78,1, sd_roll>20,1, sample_cliff==1,1, true(),0)
      | eval cond_msg=case(isnull(upv) OR upv==0,"up_zero", sd_roll>20,"scrape_duration_outlier_timeout_risk", sample_cliff==1,"post_relabel_sample_cliff", true(),"prom_scrape_ok")
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=prom sourcetype=prometheus:server_log component=scrape earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,"")))
      | eval entity_key=job."::".instance
      | eval lane="prom_log"
      | eval errtxt=lower(toString(coalesce(error_message,_raw,"")))
      | eval deg_f=if(match(errtxt,"503|500|timeout|refused|handshake|tls:|context deadline|i/o timeout|no such host"),1,0)
      | eval cond_msg=substr(toString(coalesce(error_message,_raw,"scrape_log_event")),1,280)
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:remote_write_metrics earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,"0")),10)
      | where match(mn,"prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending|prometheus_remote_storage_shards|prometheus_remote_storage_failed_samples_total")
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"remote_write")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,prometheus_replica,service,"rw_shard")))
      | eval entity_key="remote_write::".cluster."::".coalesce(prometheus_replica,instance)
      | eval lane="remote_write"
      | eval pend=if(match(mn,"samples_pending"),mv,null())
      | eval sh=if(match(mn,"_shards"),mv,null())
      | eval fsum=if(match(mn,"failed_samples"),mv,null())
      | bucket _time span=5m
      | stats max(pend) AS remote_pending max(sh) AS remote_shards max(fsum) AS remote_failed BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | eval deg_f=case(remote_pending>180000 OR remote_shards>40 OR remote_failed>2500,1, remote_pending>60000,1, true(),0)
      | eval cond_msg="remote_pending=".toString(round(coalesce(remote_pending,0),0))." shards=".toString(round(coalesce(remote_shards,0),0))
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=blackbox:probe earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,"unk"))))
      | eval job=trim(toString(coalesce(job,"blackbox")))
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(instance,param_target,probe_target,"")))
      | eval entity_key=job."::".instance
      | eval lane="blackbox"
      | eval probe_ok=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(probe_success,up,probe_http_status_code,"1")),10)
      | eval deg_f=if(probe_ok==0 OR match(toString(probe_http_status_code),"^5"),1,0)
      | eval cond_msg=if(deg_f==1,"blackbox_probe_or_http_fail","blackbox_ok")
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
    [ | mstats latest(_value) AS mv WHERE index=otel_metrics metric_name IN ("otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points","otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points") receiver=prometheus span=5m BY metric_name service cluster
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,service,"otel"))))
      | eval job="otel_prometheus_receiver"
      | eval instance=trim(toString(coalesce(service,"otelcol")))
      | eval entity_key="otel_rx::".cluster."::".instance
      | eval lane="otel_prom_rx"
      | eval acc=if(match(metric_name,"accepted"),mv,0)
      | eval ref=if(match(metric_name,"refused"),mv,0)
      | stats sum(acc) AS acc sum(ref) AS ref BY cluster entity_key job instance _time
      | eval deg_f=if(ref>0 AND acc>0 AND ref>0.08*acc,1,0)
      | eval cond_msg="otel_rx_refused_ratio_pct=".toString(round(100*ref/(acc+0.001),2))
      | eval up_rolling=null()
      | eval sd_roll=null()
      | eval samples_post=null()
      | eval samples_scraped=null()
      | eval remote_pending=null()
      | eval remote_shards=null()
      | eval remote_failed=null()
      | fields _time cluster lane entity_key job instance up_rolling sd_roll samples_post samples_scraped deg_f cond_msg remote_pending remote_shards remote_failed ]
| eval inv_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,job."/".instance,entity_key,""))))
| eval prom_host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,cluster,""))))
| stats max(_time) AS last_seen max(deg_f) AS deg_f values(lane) AS lanes max(up_rolling) AS up_rolling max(sd_roll) AS sd_roll max(samples_post) AS samples_post max(samples_scraped) AS samples_scraped first(cond_msg) AS cond_msg max(remote_pending) AS remote_pending max(remote_shards) AS remote_shards max(remote_failed) AS remote_failed BY cluster entity_key job instance inv_key prom_host
| eval coalesce_lane=mvindex(mvdedup(lanes),0)
| eventstats sum(eval(if(deg_f==1,1,0))) AS cluster_bad_cnt count AS cluster_rows BY cluster
| eval cluster_fail_rate=round(100*cluster_bad_cnt/nullif(cluster_rows,0),3)
| eventstats median(cluster_fail_rate) AS fleet_median_cr
| eval dc_anomaly=if(cluster_fail_rate>5*fleet_median_cr AND fleet_median_cr>0.01,1,0)
| eval severity=case(deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_metrics") AND (isnull(up_rolling) OR up_rolling<0.45),"page", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_log"),"page", coalesce(remote_pending,0)>180000,"page", dc_anomaly==1,"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"prom_metrics"),"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"blackbox"),"warn", deg_f==1 AND match(coalesce_lane,"otel_prom_rx"),"warn", deg_f==1,"warn", true(),"info")
| eval recommended_action=case(match(coalesce_lane,"prom_log"),"inspect_target_tls_http_logs_dns_and_mtls_paths_for_scrape_url", match(coalesce_lane,"remote_write"),"tune_remote_write_queues_shards_and_downstream_capacity_review_failed_samples", match(coalesce_lane,"blackbox"),"compare_blackbox_probe_path_with_prometheus_target_labels_and_ingress", match(coalesce_lane,"otel_prom_rx"),"scale_otel_receiver_or_widen_batch_limits_check_prometheus_receiver_config", dc_anomaly==1,"pair_sister_dc_change_windows_and_network_partitions", true(),"validate_scrape_timeout_sample_limits_metric_relabel_rules_and_service_discovery")
| join type=left max=0 inv_key [| inputlookup prometheus_target_inventory.csv | eval inv_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,job."/".instance,job_instance,"")))) | fields inv_key owner expected_scrape_interval criticality federation_edge]
| join type=left max=0 cluster [| inputlookup prometheus_federation_topology.csv | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(dest_cluster))) | rename src_prometheus AS fed_src dest_prometheus AS fed_dest | fields cluster fed_src fed_dest federation_slo_skew_sec]
| join type=left max=0 prom_host [| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.mem_used_percent) AS dm_mem latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS dm_cpu FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Performance.host | rename Performance.host AS prom_host]
| eval owner=coalesce(owner,"unowned")
| eval criticality=coalesce(criticality,"tier3")
| eval fed_src=coalesce(fed_src,"none")
| eval fed_dest=coalesce(fed_dest,"none")
| table cluster, entity_key, coalesce_lane, job, instance, inv_key, up_rolling, sd_roll, samples_post, cluster_fail_rate, severity, recommended_action, last_seen, owner, criticality, fed_src, fed_dest, dm_cpu, dm_mem, remote_pending, cond_msg
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS cpu_load latest(Performance.mem_used_percent) AS mem_used FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance host=* earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
| rename Performance.host AS metric_host
| join type=left max=0 metric_host
    [| inputlookup prometheus_target_inventory.csv
     | eval metric_host=lower(trim(toString(instance)))
     | fields metric_host job owner criticality]
| where like(lower(job),"%prom%") OR like(lower(job),"%kube%") OR like(lower(job),"%node%")
| table metric_host job cpu_load mem_used owner criticality
```

## Visualization

Severity-colored table by cluster and entity_key with drilldowns to prometheus:up rows, prometheus:server_log scrape lines, remote_write gauges, blackbox probes, OTel receiver mstats, joined inventory and federation columns, and Performance enrichment; timelines for up_rolling and sd_roll.

## Known False Positives

Planned target churn during Kubernetes rollouts, Consul-template reloads, and GitOps node taints routinely produces short scrape gaps that clear within minutes; require dwell and change metadata before paging service owners. Intentional scrape_timeout increases during noisy neighbors can elevate scrape_duration_seconds without exporter failure; pair with rule_evaluation latency before treating as incidents. Consul or Kubernetes DNS rolling restarts cause intermittent resolve failures that look like TLS or HTTP errors until resolvers stabilize; suppress duplicate pages when infra tickets already cover the same window. Federation pauses during Prometheus replica failovers or meta-tier config edits can mimic remote_write backlog; distinguish leaf up series freshness from queue gauges. Blackbox exporter synthetic checks in distant regions may fail while local scrape paths remain healthy; correlate probe labels with Prometheus relabel rules before merging incidents. Deliberate sample_limit or body_size_limit tightening to control cardinality can trigger scrape_samples_post_metric_relabeling cliffs that match policy rather than broken instrumentation; confirm change tickets. ServiceMonitor and PodMonitor reconciliation lag after operator upgrades can temporarily desync target lists from workload reality; compare operator logs with inventory baselines. OTel Collector refused metric points may reflect downstream HEC pressure rather than bad scrape targets; triage with UC-13.3.15 before blaming applications. Cross-datacenter ratio alerts can fire when one sister cluster is mid-migration with fewer targets; normalize by active target counts from inventory. Stale CSV lookups that omit decommissioned jobs create false drift signals until weekly refresh jobs run.
